os_version: Windows Server 2022 (GCE flutter-gemma-gpu, us-central1-a, NVidia T4, embeddings ran on CPU)
note: Cached-embedding benchmark (embeddings precomputed via embedding_cache_builder_test.dart, then bench reads from JSON). Two consecutive runs reported here as the median of measurements; full JSON write failed because the ngrok SSH tunnel rotated before the integration_test runner could flush — numbers extracted from stdout transcript and consistent across both runs.
